action.reasoning: Observation: Previous eval (iter 1) showed 0.2% success rate. Iter 4 trained with CNN+one-hot+intrinsic reward for 1M timesteps/env but no eval was submitted. Need to evaluate current checkpoints to measure progress. Analysis: The improved representation (one-hot encoding) and exploration (intrinsic reward) from iter 4 should have helped, but beta=0.01 may be too weak. Decision: Submit eval on current checkpoints to get baseline, then retrain with much stronger exploration (beta=0.5, higher entropy, reward normalization).
